heading: Research on marine highway transportation
label: 55604 Research on marine highway transportation
notes: Amendments2022—Pars. (1) to (5). added pars. (1) and (2) and redesignated former pars. (1) to (3) as (3) to (5), respectively.Pub. L. 117–2632021— substituted “marine highway” for “short sea” in section catchline and wherever appearing in text.Pub. L. 116–283
Effective DateSection effective 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2
amendments: Amendments2022—Pars. (1) to (5). added pars. (1) and (2) and redesignated former pars. (1) to (3) as (3) to (5), respectively.Pub. L. 117–2632021— substituted “marine highway” for “short sea” in section catchline and wherever appearing in text.Pub. L. 116–283

children.text: the economic effects of marine highway transportation on the United States economy;
the effects of marine highway transportation, including with respect to the provision of additional transportation options, on rural areas;
the environmental and transportation benefits to be derived from marine highway transportation alternatives for other forms of transportation;

technology, vessel design, and other improvements that would reduce emissions, increase fuel economy, and lower costs of marine highway transportation and increase the efficiency of intermodal transfers; and
solutions to impediments to marine highway transportation projects designated under section 55601.
